Homepage.areYouPwrStudent: Are you a student at Wrocław University of Science and Technology?
Homepage.installApp: Don’t forget to install the app
Homepage.topwrFeaturesDescription: In it, you’ll find all the information you need about parking, SKS menus, the campus map, and much more.
Homepage.wroclawUniversityOfScienceAndTechnology: Wrocław University of Science and Technology
Homepage.studentGovernmentFacultyOfManagement: Student Government of the Faculty of Management
Homepage.failedToLoadEvents: Oh no! Failed to load events: {message}
Homepage.noEventsInSelectedMonth: No events in the selected month
Homepage.githubStarMotivation: If you appreciate our work on Eventownik, give us a star on GitHub — it’s a great motivation for us to keep improving!
Homepage.teamIntroDescription:
Eventownik was created thanks to the work of {count} people from our team.

We built it to make organizing events and meeting people easier.
Homepage.stayUpdatedWithEventownik: Stay up to date with Solvro Eventownik
Homepage.eventCreationSupport: When creating an event on Eventownik, we encourage you to contact our support person — we’ll gladly explain everything and help if you run into any issues. If you don’t feel the need, you can also create the event completely on your own!
Homepage.eventGuideDescr: To help organizers create their first event on Eventownik and fully utilize the platform’s capabilities, we have prepared a clear and detailed guide describing all available features.
Homepage.accountRequirementDescr: Participants signing up for events do not need to have an account. Creating one is only required for organizers in order to create an event.
Homepage.coorganizersPermissionsDescr: When creating an event, you can add co-organizers and assign them specific permissions, such as access only to the participants list or the ability to edit the form. This makes collaboration much easier when the event is organized by an entire organizing team!
Homepage.securityAndScalabilityDescr: Eventownik was created in consultation with units of Wrocław University of Science and Technology — including the IT Department, the Data Protection Officer, and others. Thanks to this, it meets the highest security standards. What's more, it can handle very heavy loads and support large numbers of users simultaneously without losing stability.
Homepage.coCreationOfEvents: Co-creation of events by multiple people
Homepage.coorganizerSettingsInOrganizerPanel: Co-organizer settings in the organizer panel
Homepage.loginDescription: Enter your email to sign in.
Homepage.pilotAccessWRSSDescr: Organizers from WRSS (Faculty Council of the Student Government) W6, W8, and W12 were given pilot access to Eventownik to test its functionality and evaluate how effectively it can improve the management of a large-scale event.
Homepage.rejsW8Descr: After the success of Eventownik during the Raid, WuZetka decided to once again use the application to organize their next event — the W8 River Trip 2025.
Homepage.grazUniteTrip: Trip to Graz within the Unite! program
Homepage.grazUniteTripDescr: Students from our KN Solvro participated in an exchange trip to Graz as part of the Unite! program. During the organization of the trip, they used Eventownik, which improved the entire planning and execution process.
Homepage.featuresExplore: Check what you can do and how to use the available features!
Homepage.eventCreationAndConfigurationDescr: Create and configure events, set participant attributes, and add co-organizers.
Homepage.eventCustomizationDescr: Customize the event appearance, registration forms, and settings to fit your participants and the type of event.
Homepage.emailsDescr: Creating templates with dynamic data, automatic and group email sending based on participant status.
Homepage.eventNewNotificationMessage: A new event has been added. Check it out!
Homepage.eventPageDescr: A public page with schedule and updates, ready to be shared on social media.
Homepage.emailNotificationsDescr: Automatic messages sent by organizers to participants.
Homepage.registrationPageDescr: Automatically generated page containing all key information: date, location, description, and registration form.
Homepage.formsAndReservationsDescr: Create forms with selected attributes, generate registration links, and automatically share second-stage forms — including real-time registration updates.
Homepage.registrationManagementDescr: Choose how registered participants are displayed — anonymously, by full name, or using a custom attribute.

Table.deleteParticipantErrorDescription: An error occurred while deleting the participant
Table.deleteParticipantsErrorDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Try again
Table.helpMultiSortDescription1: To sort by multiple columns at once, hold down the Shift key and click the headers of the columns you want to sort by.
Table.helpMultiSortDescription2:
The sorting priority will correspond to the order in which you click the columns, e.g.:

Clicking the Name column first, and then (holding Shift!) the Age column,

data will be sorted first by name, and then by age.
Table.deleteManySelectedTooltip: Delete {count, plural, =1 {1 selected participant} other {# selected participants}}
Table.deleteManyConfirmDescription: You are about to delete {count, plural, =1 {1 participant} other {# participants}} at once. This operation cannot be undone
Table.deleteSingleConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this participant? This operation cannot be undone
